channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New Brazil law restricts use of smartphones in elementary and high schools
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazil's President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva on Monday signed a bill restricting the use of smartphones at school, following a global trend for such limitations. The move will impact students at elementary and high schools across the South American nation starting in February.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE and DIARLEI RODRIGUES, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Reddit’s ad business is expanding—but it’s still small compared to other platforms
item.description: Reddit can’t stop building shiny new advertising tools. First it was dynamic product ads, then it was AI copy tools. Now, they’re premiering custom “Ask Me Anything”-themed ads.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: ClickUp CEO Zeb Evans on why workplaces will be using fewer platforms in the future
item.description: If your team subscribes to 10 different software tools, you’re not alone in wrestling with the overwhelming sprawl of productivity apps. Entrepreneurs have taken notice.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Biden admin puts new restrictions on AI chip, technology exports
item.description: The Biden administration is further restricting the sale of advanced chips used to power and develop artificial intelligence (AI) amid growing concerns about the use of American-made AI by foreign adversaries.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Britain's leader unveils AI strategy, including vow to rip up red tape hindering AI projects
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The British government pledged on Monday to rip up the red tape hindering construction of data centers that underpin artificial intelligence while promoting its “pro-innovation” approach to regulating the technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 9 up-and-coming tech startups with 150+ remote jobs to fill
item.description: Looking for a great new job, and want to work from anywhere? While tech giants are pushing for five-days-a-week office returns, these nine growing startups are doubling down on distributed teams. From AI to soda pop, here’s where the future of work meets the next wave of innovation.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Some customers are about to see a huge rise in their Microsoft 365 subscriptions
item.description: Microsoft has increased the prices of its Personal and Family M365 subscriptions by as much as 46% in some areas.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Biden's administration proposes new rules on exporting AI chips, provoking an industry pushback
item.description: The Biden administration is proposing a new framework for the exporting of the advanced computer chips used to develop artificial intelligence, an attempt to balance national security concerns about the technology with the economic interests of producers and other countries.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jeff Bezos' space company tries again to launch massive new rocket after last-minute postponement
item.description: Blue Origin will try again to launch its massive new rocket as early as Thursday after calling off the debut launch because of ice buildup in critical plumbing.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kelly says he is aware TikTok ban 'is controversial,' but there is 'national security risk to' app
item.description: Sen. Mark Kelly (D-Ariz.) said Sunday he is aware that the possible TikTok ban “is controversial,” yet the app “has a national security risk to it.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: A Simple Note-Taking Solution: Notepad Online - A Game-Changer for Productivity
item.description: Discover the simplicity of Notepad Online, a web-based note-taking app that's free, private, and accessible on any device.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: AI is changing the way we grieve and perceive death
item.description: Imagine attending a funeral where the person who has died speaks directly to you, answering your questions and sharing memories. This happened at the funeral of Marina Smith, a Holocaust educator who died in 2022.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Tech leaders' message to Biden
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TikTok’s future looks bleak
item.description: TikTok’s future prospects in the United States looked grimmer than ever Friday, following a bruising day of Supreme Court arguments in a case that could determine whether the app is forced to shut down on January 19.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Meta rolls back diversity and inclusion efforts, appeasing Trump
item.description: Staff will no longer be required to interview candidates from under-represented backgrounds or look to do business with diverse suppliers.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: How to easily print photos from your phone
item.description: Most cameras allow you to instantly transfer images from a camera to a smartphone via Bluetooth, and you can print photos directly from your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta tries letting Facebook Marketplace users view eBay listings as way to resolve EU charges
item.description: Meta said Wednesday that it will allow some Facebook users to view eBay listings on its Marketplace service, as it tries out a possible way to resolve European Union charges of anticompetitive behavior that the bloc leveled last year.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Meta rolls back hate speech rules as Zuckerberg cites 'recent elections' as a catalyst
item.description: It wasn't just fact-checking that Meta scrapped from its platforms as it prepares for the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sanchez to marry in Italy: Source
item.description: Amazon billionaire and his blushing bride-to-be, Lauren Sanchez, held a lovely dinner party over the holidays at Matsuhisa in Aspen.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: ByteDance's Lemon8 gains traction amid TikTok ban threat as creators push the app
item.description: Hearing a lot about Lemon8 lately? You’re not the only one. Amid a looming U.S. ban on TikTok, content creators have been pushing the platform's sister app.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta's new board includes UFC boss Dana White, a familiar figure in Trump's orbit
item.description: Meta has appointed three new members to its board of directors, including Dana White, the president and CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship and a familiar figure in the orbit of incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: FBI's new warning about AI-driven scams that are after your cash
item.description: FBI warns that criminals are using generative AI to exploit individuals with deceptive tactics. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains their tactics and how to protect yourself from them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
